# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Docker Compose configuration for ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana). Define services for log collection, storage, and visualization. Configure Logstash pipelines for log parsing. Expose Kibana UI and Elasticsearch ports for access. This is for our centralized logging platform.
# Category: elasticsearch_logs_exposed

version: '3'

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.10.1
    container_name: elk_es_01
    environment:
      - xpack.security.enabled=false
      - node.name=elk-es-01
      - discovery.seed_hosts=elk_es_01,elk_es_02,elk_es_03
      - cluster.initial_master_nodes=elk-es-01,elk-es-02,elk-es-03
    volumes:
      - /opt/elasticsearch/data:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:7.10.1
    container_name: elk_ls_01
    environment:
      - LS_LOGS_DIR=/var/lib/docker/containers
    volumes:
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock
      - /opt/elasticsearch/data/logstash/:/logs
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:7.10.1
    container_name: elk_kbn_01
    environment:
      ELASTICSEARCH_URL=http://elk_es_01:9200
    ports:
      - "5601:5601"
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch

volumes:
  elasticsearch_data:
